column1: Hey aaron, thanks for your interest in traveling with SpringBreak U by Go Blue Tours. Your personal trip rep, Spiffy, will text shortly with info and details
What's good! It's Spiffy from SpringBreak U here
Which week is your spring break? I'll send over the options and deets
cool i got you, which destination were you lookin to book?
wordd punta cana is lit, that's where i'm at every year
how many ppl in your group?
dope thats a solid group! we all from the same school?
Yeah we all from university of south Carolina I
oh bet yea we got some groups from there pullin this year and had a few last year
y'all def know how to party lol
Liked “y'all def know how to party lol”
puttin this info together for you rn, how soon were you looking to get things started?
yessir my bad don't think my texts sent, whats a good email for you i'll send it rn
just sent lmk if it came through
For the occidental punta Cana do u have like an itinerary for what the night and daytime events are

there is one but it hasn't been released just yet, but there basically daily beach/pool parties and also a night club on resort thats open every night with a dj, i'll actually be at the resort too its lit there lol
then we also have our off resort party package, includes 3 club events + a booze cruise, highly recommend it bro
At the night club are drinks included or nah
yessir, so food and drink (alcohol too) is included on the resort and the resort night club
for the party package all drinks are also included, it comes with express entry into the clubs, cover charge, open bar, plus round trip transportation, same with te booze cruise
currently running a package deal on the party package, can get all of those events and everything for only $200
yessir, i can also hook it up with a discount on some of those prices, just lmk which package we wanna roll with
Thanks bro do u know how much it would it be per person if we all got the club pass
Also in the email it says diff dates do ug have anything the week 9th-13th too?
yea we can do the 9th-13, usually everyone you week does the 7-11/12, but pricing is the same
for the 5 night with the party package i can get it down to $949- 4 per room, and for 4 night i can get it to $796-4 per room, both of those are with the party package add on
Thabks bro I'll lyk what we doing soon
bet brotha, would be dope to have you guys out there
What airport would we fly into?
Yo is there a cover for the night clubs if we get a package?
nahh bro, with the package it covers everything, dont gotta even bring your wallet lol
its fire bro, all you gotta do is drink and party lol. we take care of all the thinking
Loved “its fire bro, all you gotta do is drink and party lol. we take care of all the thinking”
I think we will be ready to book by next Sunday the prices still stay the same right
they should, tbh prices change this time of year pretty frequently, but i'll keep an eye out and lyk if i see anything change
was there a few of you guys who are locked in?
Yeah I'd say like 5 of us are confirmed rn and like another 10 or so gotta figure it out
bet, would the ones who are locked in be down to deposit? it's easier for me to add people on an open reservation and will also be able to finesse and lock in pricing for everyone
and the rest can hop in on sunday when they are ready, same price
yerr my fault bro i knocked out but bet lmk, pricing shouldn't change so you should be good, i'll lyk if i see anything changing
were we leanin towards the 4 or 5 night? just so i can tell operations try to finesse for y'all
yessir, lmk if y'all got any questions
Loved “yessir, lmk if y'all got any questions”
Do u guys have a package at this hotel
Js making sure u got this^
What's good bro, yea we do

Want that one instead? I've stayed at both the Occidental Caribe and the Occidental Punta Cana before. Personally the Occ Punta Cana is a lot better. Nicer amenities, food is better, and it's more of the party resort now
Either way you gon have a good time. But just my personal opinion. The caribe does have a casino, I'd say that's the only plus. But rooms, experience, etc is smoother at the Occ Punta Cana
I can hook it up for either or tho
Thanks man I'm gonna ask my friends and see what they wanna do
Aight bet bro. We def have it rn tho if that's what yall want, so the option is there
Want to give the heads up tho things are flying this week so availability for all packages are slimming down
Do u think ug will still have availability by end of this week
Loved “Aight bet bro. We def have it rn tho if that's what yall want, so the option is there”
Right now we have 10 people if we got 20 would we get a bigger discount
If you get to 20 I can either hook you up with a free stay or spread that discount amongst the group so that everyone gets a little more off
It won't be a ton but will def help a little
If I split it do uk how much off it would be a person
Depends on exactly how many ppl but it'll be around $20-30ish off per person. Ballpark could be more or less
Liked “Depends on exactly how many ppl but it'll be around $20-30ish off per person. Ballpark could be more or less”
If I have 8 people that are confirmed and like 4 that are not how would that work setting up rooms so we could all get on the trip
I can set up the reservation for you 8, and we can add the 4 in once they confirm as long as we still have the availability
It's def best to get you 8 settled asap if you def tryna go
Word thanks how would it work if we had an odd number and one room had 3 would they pay more
Like if it was 7 total? Yea they would just have the 3 person room rate. It's a little more but not a lot
Do uk how much more it is
Liked “Like if it was 7 total? Yea they would just have the 3 person room rate. It's a little more but not a lot”
I'll tell you rn. For caribe?
5 nights? Just wanna get you the exact price
Word so rn 4 per room is $799, but $749 with my discount. 3 per room is $829, but $779 with discount
I could even out the price for everyone if you want too. So it's spread across everyone and you all pay the same amount. If we want
Liked “I could even out the price for everyone if you want too. So it's spread across everyone and you all pay the same amount. If we want”
By the end of today I will probably have 10-12 people ready to sign up should I do it though the email you sent me if we want to make the cost even between everyone
Ima send you a new fresh link, the one you have is a sample quote. Yall can all start slotting in. With 12 that puts you at the even three rooms of 4 at $749
Ok thanks is this for 5 nights with the package?
Yessir. All inclusive all you can eat and drink open bar all that
I'll be out there too brooo
Lmk when u sent me the link
sent that email brotha did you see it?
Liked “sent that email brotha did you see it?”
For the rooms for the reservation will they be near each other also is it 2 queens?
Also for the flights how would we get to the resort
yoo, easy bro. we have a transfer service as part of your package. you just enter your flight info onto your account and our ops team gets you all lined up
the rooms are two double beds which are in between a queen size and a full size
Liked “the rooms are two double beds which are in between a queen size and a full size”

cant guarantee rooms will be right next to eachother. the resort desk attendant assigns the physical room number at the time of check in based on what they have available with their check outs. but we can always request them to be on the same floor, same building, etc, while checking in. our team will be there to help you with that
if they have two side by side rooms avail at the time, they'll happily assign the two
yessir. hows everyone else lookin? everyone on board
Yeah so far we got 10 on board trying to get by 12. We will book tmrw regardless if we get 12
aight word. if we have 10 we can still shift some things around and finesse a good set up on the rooms
I'll have a final number for u by tn or tmrw morning
if the 10 are locked I'd recommend starting to slot names into the spots on the res, just so we can keep things active for tomorrow
Liked “aight word. if we have 10 we can still shift some things around and finesse a good set up on the rooms”
People still gotta figure some things out u think tmrw will be good?
Also is there a conscience store in the resort to get hard alcohol
tomorrow should be straight I just needa let ops team know
Liked “tomorrow should be straight I just needa let ops team know”
and yea there is, but theres free open bar all across the resort bro
Liked “and yea there is, but theres free open bar all across the resort bro”
I have 13 that are confirmed and 2 on the fence how would that work through the reservation and pricing if they decide they can or can't go
word so I'll add two more rooms to the reservation for now. if those two can't go or decide not to, we'll just close those slots down and adjust rooms accordingly
Alr word thanks lmk when u send over new reservation
send this link to your group text so the 13 can start securing their spots. they can hop into the rooms based on who they want to room with and we can adjust a little if needed
Ok thanks they will start filling it out and I'll lyk when ik abt the other 2
Js making sure everyone pays the same amount right
Even if they got 3 to a room
Also which party package is it
depends which one we wanna do. were you lookin to do the bundle discount? with multiple parties
if so I can add that in for you. itll include imagine, coco bongo, and the booze cruise for $200
Do I need a new reservation link or nah
nah gonna add it right to your account on that current one
did everyone want the same thing or just you?
I got it just a few more questions. To reserve our reservation what's the minimum amount you have to put down and does that package include things for all 5 nights
yupp. have you gotten to create an account on that link yet?
it'll show the exact dates: 5 nights 3/7 to 3/12. and shows the deposit amount of $200 per person
Yeah I'm almost done about to make the deposit
each person makes their own payments and reserves their own slots
Liked “each person makes their own payments and reserves their own slots”
Just making sure the party package has things for all 5 nights
so rn you got 2 nights off resort and the booze cruise is during the day. wanna add one more night off resort? I can discount it
theres def a night you wanna stay on the resort, theres a nightclub on resort that everyone goes to that we'll bring a DJ in
Oh ok word. Do u think it's worth getting the 3rd night or nah
yea it is lets see what I can get it down to price wise. it would be that Maroca Nightclub night you saw for $69. gonna see if I can get it added in at $50
if I can, want me to add it on for everyone?
Is that 3rd rlly much diff than the hotel club
I meann. if y'all not sure about it I say don't do it. we can always decide later on
Yeah we prob won't do it then thanks
Loved “I meann. if y'all not sure about it I say don't do it. we can always decide later on”
Just making sure our flight lands at 1130 at puj ug will bring us to resort right
yeassir just add your flight info into your account and we'll take it from there
Liked “yeassir just add your flight info into your account and we'll take it from there”
Just making sure it says ug provide flights
Flights aren't included in your package so that piece doesn't apply to you
Liked “Flights aren't included in your package so that piece doesn't apply to you”
yerrr whats good big dog. any word on Max? and then theres like 3 open slots chillin. are ppl hoppin in those
I gotta ask him max will do it soon he's sick
Aight bet bet. keep me posted
Everyone that is going paid. We are figuring out who's gonna switch into the 2 person room so it's 1 4 person room and 3 3 person rooms
Also u think it's worth it to get the insurance for the trip?
bet keep me posted on who wants to do the 2 person
I say only get it if you think you're gonna need to cancel. if not, don't
like if theres a chance you may cancel, then get it
Ok got it thanks. Would it cost more money to keep them in the 2 room?
yea bro, its a little more than the 3 and 4 person room
Ok I'll find someone to switch
Bet just lmk and we'll work it out
I'll get the pricing as low as I can
Is there any chance you can switch Kyle mass into the room of 2 just so it's even. After that it's final and everyone that's going is in the process. Preciate the help
the 3 person room technically costs more than the 4 person room but I'll finesse it for you
All set bro. everyone at the same price
Yo alsmot eveyone fully payed js trying to get the last few guys to pay in full asap. Is it an issue if they pay it a few days late
The due date is today on the site
yoyo my B I missed your text
Yea looks like Tyler and Max. when they able to get their payments in?
They should be doing it today is that chill
Yo I'm trying to figure out the flights for the trip and a bunch of us are taking different flights so when I know exact details do I just tell u guys the time and u take us?
Yo! So soon as you get your flight details, log back into your account and enter that into the flights tab
Our team will take it from there and get each of you squared away based on your flights
Liked “Our team will take it from there and get each of you squared away based on your flights”
Just making sure all we gotta do is put in our flight info into the spot right. After we buy the insurance in the giblue thing do we have to do anything after that

nah insurance is all set as long as you got purchase confirmation. and yea just enter flight info and youre chillin. next steps you'll start to get your pre departure info - like where to find transportation, your vouchers, confirmation numbers, etc
Word Where do we get that
that all gets released right into your account. youll get a bunch of email notifications as things go out
Liked “that all gets released right into your account. youll get a bunch of email notifications as things go out”
Yo js wanted to know when the next step is coming out for the trip
What's good brooo. So you all have your flight info entered onto your accounts?
I'll make sure everyone does it asap
Yo I'm getting everyone to put there flight info in anything else I should be doing or expecting. Thanks
that should be all good after that! you all will start getting pre departure info with details on how to find our transfer service when you land, what the week itinerary is, etc
Liked “that should be all good after that! you all will start getting pre departure info with details on how to find our transfer service when you land, what the week itinerary is, etc”
Yo ik the trips coming up js wanted to make sure we all set for transportation from airport to hotel and also how does the transportation work from hotel to clubs. Thanks
yooo, yup everyone has their flights in. and the party pass comes with transportation to the clubs yup
When should we get an email for like confirmation or something
your vouchers will be avail on your accounts tomorrow. those will have confirmation numbers and each party pass voucher you need to redeem your event tickets when you arrive
Yo just wondering for the restaurants at the hotel do we need a reservation and how do we book them if we do. Thanks
Also for the forms we need when we land at puj do we need to print that? It was about immigration and our stay
yooo, so for the restaurants when you get there you can go to the help desk and make reservations super easy. our onsite staff can help with that too
and nah you don't need to print it out, you fill out the form and can email it to yourself, will come with a QR code for them to scan
Liked “yooo, so for the restaurants when you get there you can go to the help desk and make reservations super easy. our onsite staff can help with that too”
Liked “and nah you don't need to print it out, you fill out the form and can email it to yourself, will come with a QR code for them to scan”
Yo for the way back to the airport when we leaving punta cana do uk how early they drop us off there
Also do uk if there's a casino nearby
Usually a couple hours before your flight. Out on site staff will let you know your exact times
Liked “Usually a couple hours before your flight. Out on site staff will let you know your exact times”
yooo safe travels today bro see y'all out here soon
Loved “yooo safe travels today bro see y'all out here soon”
